title: Meters; false measurement
doc_html:
§847.  Meters; false measurement

No person furnishing gas, electricity or water to consumers shall knowingly construct, use or furnish to the consumers any false meter or any false system for measuring and registering the quantity of gas, electricity, or water consumed by the patron.
doc_text:
§847.  Meters; false measurement
No person furnishing gas, electricity or water to consumers shall knowingly construct, use or furnish to the consumers any false meter or any false system for measuring and registering the quantity of gas, electricity, or water consumed by the patron.
